title: Customizable Player Models Flashback Compat
description: Adds compatibility between Customizable Player Models and Flashback
body:
Adds integration between [Customizable Player Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-player-models) and [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback).

Adds the player data to the recording to successfully replay scenes with CPM models.
And fixes the animations playing incorrectly while in replay.
